packageRules.description: Auto-merge patch and minor updates for app dependencies after green CI plus the release-age cooldown.
GitHub Actions updates always require human review: CI runs the very workflow revision under review, and the release-age cooldown does not apply to digest updates.
Node runtime (.nvmrc via the nvm manager and engines.node via the npm manager) is grouped and held for review; it is an environment change, never auto-merged.
Hold every major upgrade for manual review on the Dependency Dashboard; no PR is opened until it is approved there.
